# Meva Clinic - AI Crawler Information

Meva Clinic is a premium medical tourism clinic located in Istanbul, Turkey.
We specialize in VIP medical treatments for international patients, with a focus on the Romanian market.

## Core Specializations
- Bariatric Surgery (Gastric Sleeve, Gastric Bypass, Da Vinci Robotic Surgery)
- Dental Implants & Digital Dentistry
- Oncology (Robotic Oncology, CyberKnife)
- Hair Transplant (Sapphire FUE)
- Plastic Surgery (Deep Plane Facelift, Rhinoplasty)
- Organ Transplant

## Expert Physicians
- Dr. Hasan Erdem (Bariatric Surgery)
- Dr. Zeynep Turan (Bariatric/Metabolic Surgery)
- Dr. Harun Alakaya (Hair Restoration)

## Key Advantages
- JCI Accredited Partner Clinics (Acibadem Network)
- 12-Month Nutritional Intelligence follow-up for Bariatric patients
- 5-Star VIP Accommodation & Logistics
- Free Consultations
- Support in Romanian, English, and Turkish

## Location
Acibadem Partner Clinic
Istanbul, Turkey

## Contact
